html:
It is interesting how this is becoming more and more relevant within the frontier labs. We built Ploid AI (https://ploid.ai/) along the same pain and we are benchmarking Claude Science to see how we compare.

Have any of you experience a similar situation? Do you guys think a small startup like us can beat a close-to-be-1T-IPO company?

Welcoming opinions on our product as well :)
